zh.lifeSummary: 當Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame於1279年2月12日出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德時，他的父親Robert de Clermont capet22歲，母親Béatrice de BOURGOGNE21歲。他於1310年11月25日與Marie d'Avesnes在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦朋托結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1341年2月22日在他的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內沙吉亞可斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame于1279年2月12日出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德时，他的父亲Robert de Clermont capet22岁，母亲Béatrice de BOURGOGNE21岁。他于1310年11月25日与Marie d'Avesnes在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦朋托结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1341年2月22日在他的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內沙吉亞可斯。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

variants.name: Borbon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Jesus, Marta, Miguel Angel, Tomas, Ademar, Alfredo, Ana Maria, Bernabe, Berta, Carlos.
Spanish (Borbón): variant of Bourbon .

nameMeanings.name: I,The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with odal ‘inherited property’ as the first element.

variants.name: Utt
meanings: German: variant of   Uthe  .

nameMeanings.name: Lame
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of German   Lahm  .
French (Lamé): nickname from Old French amé ‘beloved’ (from the past participle of aimer ‘to love’), with fused definite article l'.
Albanian: from a short form of the Muslim personal name   Islam  .

variants.name: Lahm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gunther, Otto.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic):
nickname for someone who was slow or lame, from Middle High German lam ‘lame’.

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi
meanings: form, since the Middle Ages, of the French name Louis . In modern use it is also in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this given name, or from Anglicized forms of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh ’ or Welsh Llewelyn .

en.lifeSummary: When Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame was born on 12 February 1279, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Robert de Clermont capet, was 22 and his mother, Béatrice de BOURGOGNE, was 21. He married Marie d'Avesnes on 25 November 1310, in Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 22 February 1341, in his hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Saint-Jacques, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame est né le 12 février 1279, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Robert de Clermont capet, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Béatrice de BOURGOGNE, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Marie d'Avesnes le 25 novembre 1310, à Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 22 février 1341, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Jacques, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame am 12. Februar 1279 in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Clermont capet 22 und seine Mutter Béatrice de BOURGOGNE 21. Er hat am 25. November 1310 in Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich Marie d'Avesnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Februar 1341 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Saint-Jacques, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame è nato il il 12 febbraio 1279 nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Robert de Clermont capet, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Béatrice de BOURGOGNE, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Marie d'Avesnes il 25 novembre 1310, nel Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 22 febbraio 1341, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Jacques, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Louis De Bourbon I,The Lameが1279年2月12日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドで生まれた時，父Robert de Clermont capetは22歳，母Béatrice de BOURGOGNEは21歳であった。1310年11月25日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼポントイゼでMarie d'Avesnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1341年2月22日に故郷で62歳で死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンサイント-ジャククスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame(이)가 1279년 2월 12일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Clermont capet(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrice de BOURGOGNE(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1310년 11월 25일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 폰토이스에서 Marie d'Avesnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1341년 2월 22일 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 세인트-재c크스에 묻혔다.

mn.12 FEB 1279–22 FEB 1341: 1279 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 12–1341 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 22

pt.12 FEB 1279–22 FEB 1341: 12 de fevereiro de 1279–22 de fevereiro de 1341
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame nasceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1279, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Robert de Clermont capet, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice de BOURGOGNE, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie d'Avesnes em 25 de novembro de 1310, em Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1341, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Jacques, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame родился 12 февраля 1279 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert de Clermont capet было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Béatrice de BOURGOGNE, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie d'Avesnes 25 ноября 1310 г. в местности понтоис, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 22 февраля 1341 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-джаккуесь, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

sm.Between 1327 and 1343: mai le 1327 e o'o I le 1343

es.12 FEB 1279–22 FEB 1341: 12 de febrero de 1279–22 de febrero de 1341
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame nació el 12 de febrero de 1279, en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Robert de Clermont capet, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Béatrice de BOURGOGNE, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Marie d'Avesnes el 25 de noviembre de 1310, en Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 22 de febrero de 1341, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Jacques, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
